input: Research customer insights to produce cohesive blogs, videos, and social posts across all channels while tracking engagement and conversion metrics to hit sales targets.

subtasks.input: Gather quantitative and qualitative data about customer preferences, pain points, and behavior through surveys, social listening tools, and website analytics platforms.
Process collected data to extract actionable insights about audience segments, content preferences, and engagement trends.
Generate a list of blog, video, and social post topics that address identified customer needs and interests.
Write and edit blog posts optimized for SEO and audience engagement, incorporating customer insights.
Script, film, and edit videos addressing customer pain points or demonstrating product value.
Create platform-specific social content (text, images, hashtags) tailored to audience engagement patterns.
Schedule blogs, videos, and social posts across platforms using a coordinated publishing timeline.
Set up Google Analytics, social platform insights, and UTM-tagged links to monitor content performance.
Track likes, shares, comments, bounce rates, and time-on-page metrics daily to assess content resonance.
Measure form completions, email signups, product purchases, and other KPIs tied to revenue goals.
Compile engagement and conversion data into actionable reports highlighting top-performing content.
Adjust topics, formats, and distribution channels using performance data to improve engagement and conversions.
